items.title: Spanish police beat and detain Gaza flotilla activists at airport

items.title: Red Cross volunteers die from suspected Ebola in DR Congo
items.dek: They are thought to have caught the virus before the outbreak was identified, the Red Cross says.
items.body: They are thought to have caught the virus before the outbreak was identified, the Red Cross says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: F1 great Prost 'injured as masked gang raid home'
items.dek: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Alain Prost was injured when a masked gang raided his home near Geneva, Swiss media reports.
items.body: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Alain Prost was injured when a masked gang raided his home near Geneva, Swiss media reports.
items.author: IriLine Desk
